Claim: The appropriate suture technique for closing an inflamed bowel wall is the horizontal mattress pattern.  
Evidence: - Fragile inflamed tissue risks rupture under tension, requiring a suture that minimizes mechanical stress. - Horizontal mattress provides optimal tissue approximation and distributes tension evenly across multiple layers.  
Answer: C
